_format: EXACT-IJCNN session handoff (state-summary, not raw transcript). Load this in a new Cowork session and ask Claude to read it to resume.
project: EXACT 2026 (IJCNN) Explainable AI Challenge — neuro-symbolic Type1 logic QA + Type2 physics, live HTTP /predict API

status_board.YNU_meta_unknown: INTEGRATED INTO Account B (endpoint full-gate still to run on Kaggle, clean kernel)
status_board.YNU_yes_no_proof: OFF (needs rule-inference engine; atom-collapse false-chain risk)
status_board.1B_option_pruning: WAITING (engine-limited; needs strict contradicted audit; low priority)

banked_gains_all_gate_verified.cert_v3_premises_used: +2.0pp Type1 (P2 0.7155->0.7556 on Phase-1), 0 regression, full_proof-only, partial OFF
banked_gains_all_gate_verified.ynu_meta_unknown_cert: +4.0pp Type1 over full 25 (subgroup: +8.33 P1/+8.33 P2 over 12 YNU); holdout 779 YNU + 838 MC = 0 spurious, 0 MC fire

scoring_model: Type1 = (P1 answer + P2 premises_used)/2. P2 = F1 overlap with gold premises_used, partial credit, scored independently of P1. Type2 = answer+unit both correct.

key_findings.parser_not_bottleneck: premise parse rate 97-100% across ~15k premises. Bottleneck is UNIFICATION (option-claim atom != derived-fact atom), not parsing.
key_findings.distribution_mismatch: flat-784/608 are RULE-INFERENCE ('which statement can be inferred', options are compound rules); Phase-1 is ENTITY-GROUNDED. Holdout key_mismatch is largely OUT-OF-SCOPE for the entity engine.
key_findings.atom_v2_conclusion: 4 gated candidates (surface-rule, blanket STOP-strip, exist-only-strip, structural existential/if-comma/universal-fact) ALL non-promotable. Phase-1 ACCEPT_NOOP every time; holdout churns (gains traded for lost/wrong). MC symbolic at ceiling for this architecture. FREEZE.
key_findings.phase1_remaining_gaps: 4 not_derivable Phase-1 MC (aerial-corridor, no-take-zone, badge, open-science) need genuine rule-chaining, NOT atom representation.

ynu_branch.fires_when: request is YNU AND premise matches 'No premise states whether/that X' AND atom(X)==atom(question target) -> answer=Uncertain, premises_used=[that premise]
ynu_branch.holdout_check: spurious_fire_candidates=0, mc_fire_count=0 over 779 YNU + 838 MC -> PROMOTE_TO_DEPLOY
ynu_branch.note: pattern 'No premise states...' is Phase-1-style only; fires 0 times on flat-784/608 (safe, pattern-locked).

discipline_rules_must_keep: Self-host only, no external LLM API at inference.
3 Kaggle accounts = roles (A lab, B deploy, C audit), NOT quota bypass; final = one team one endpoint.
Promote a change ONLY via gate: PROMOTE iff verified_gain>0 AND lost=0 AND new_wrong=0 AND changed_pu_bad=0 AND new_multiple=0. full_proof_delta is DIAGNOSTIC ONLY.
Never tune on the 25 Phase-1 cases; use them only as strict-additive gate. Develop/measure on holdout.
No semantic alias (eligible≈allowed etc.). Structural changes only.
YNU: no positive-wins heuristic; Yes/No needs polarity-exact + meta-cert; abstain on conflict/missing.
Any server/deploy change must pass strict full endpoint gate from a CLEAN kernel; don't restart tunnel during judging.

files_in_downloads.notebook_ACCOUNT_B_with_ynu.ipynb: Deploy notebook (Account B) with YNU meta-cert integrated as YNU-only pre-handler. RUN endpoint full-gate on Kaggle clean kernel before submit.
files_in_downloads.premises_used_certificate_v3.py: MC cert v3 (full_proof-only, answer-aware, contradicted no-cert). FROZEN/shipped.
files_in_downloads.engine_v40_snapshot.py: v40 entity-conjunctive engine baseline (solve_entity, answer_mc, decompose_option, to_literal, atom_key, parse_premise).
files_in_downloads.parser_coverage_probe.py: Diagnostic probe: per-option status + near_proven + unification gap (key_mismatch/not_derivable/predicate_loss) + parse-fail taxonomy. Auto-detects Phase-1 log + flat jsonl.
files_in_downloads.parser_patch_gate.py: Strict-additive promotion gate. 3-way: REJECT / PROMOTE (verified gain) / ACCEPT_NOOP. fp_delta diagnostic-only.
files_in_downloads.ynu_holdout_spurious_check.py: YNU Tier-2 safety: spurious-fire + mc-fire check at scale -> PROMOTE_TO_DEPLOY.
files_in_downloads.measure_cert_v3.py: Reproducible cert v3 measurement on Phase-1.

how_to_reproduce.ynu_holdout: python3 ynu_holdout_spurious_check.py engine_v40_snapshot.py out.json exact_eval_round1_Astatine.json <flat jsonl...> type1_aug_holdout_minimal.jsonl
